trans-d_mn_111: The young man who came to pick me up is a very handsome guy!
trans-d_mn_501: I'm sorry, I have to go now.
trans-d_mn_520: How about going out for a walk after dinner?
trans-d_mn_327: I'm sorry, I have to go home now. I'll call you tomorrow.
trans-d_mn_82: It's already late, why don't you go to bed?
trans-d_mn_93: I told him to come back, but he said he was too tired. What should I do?
trans-d_mn_458: My son is a famous director now, I'm so proud that I can't wait to tell everyone.
trans-d_mn_556: I don't know how to use it, so I can't fix it.
trans-d_mn_145: Mr. Zhang, I have finished the report you assigned.
trans-d_mn_244: I will go to the market tomorrow, we will buy some vegetables and meat.
trans-d_mn_227: You're not going to eat the food left over from the banquet? If you don't eat it, it will go to waste, do you think that's right?
trans-d_mn_581: Do you want to go to the movies or the amusement park tomorrow?
trans-d_mn_195: He is still young, and he is still studying, is he not?
trans-d_mn_64: My daughter's birthday is coming up, I want to buy her a new dress, but I can't afford it.
trans-d_mn_333: I am just a small boss, I can't give you a raise.
trans-d_mn_249: Are you a teacher? You seem so knowledgeable. Or are you a doctor? You look so professional.
trans-d_mn_341: The little girl's clothes were torn by the dog, and now they need to be mended, right?
trans-d_mn_505: My son is still a child, he can't work.
trans-d_mn_626: It's already 10 o'clock, the meeting has already started, I have to go to the company.
trans-d_mn_1: Yes, I finished reading the novel you recommended. It's a good book, I also want to buy one.
trans-d_mn_640: But I'm just joking, don't take it seriously. Are you angry?
trans-d_mn_684: Do you know when the next bus leaves?
trans-d_mn_408: Are you done with your homework?
trans-d_mn_95: The boss asked me to work overtime, but I don't want to work overtime today.
trans-d_mn_14: The boss asked me to work overtime tomorrow. I said I would go to the gym. He said it's okay. Then I went to the gym.
trans-d_mn_561: Do you know what time the movie starts?
trans-d_mn_63: I agree. Are you still working overtime?
trans-d_mn_266: I have to go to the bank to withdraw money, and I have to go to the post office to send a package.
trans-d_mn_453: The son of the owner of the supermarket was injured in a car accident.
trans-d_mn_764: Yes, I'm fine, but the company is very busy these days, and I'm very tired, so I'm not going out much. Do you understand?
trans-d_mn_565: He is a very successful businessman, I think he will be able to take good care of you.
trans-d_mn_209: The weather is so hot today, I don't want to go out.
trans-d_mn_444: Look at this, you even made a hole in the wall while playing! You are so naughty!
trans-d_mn_362: I was just about to go to the bathroom when the phone rang. I didn't answer it.
trans-d_mn_103: I told him my name, but he didn't seem to remember. I don't think he recognized me. He didn't even nod. It's as if he didn't know me at all.
trans-d_mn_573: I'm going to the hospital to get my stitches removed tomorrow, so I'm going to take a day off from work today.
trans-d_mn_483: The boss said that I should go to the bank tomorrow. I have to go to work today, shall I go tomorrow?
trans-d_mn_338: He is a very good tailor, he can make any clothes you want.
trans-d_mn_700: The son is still in school, and the daughter is still in college, and the mother is still working, right? And the father? Is he still alive?
trans-d_mn_75: Do you want to go out for a walk? It's good for your health.
trans-d_mn_747: The old man said that he was just joking, and that he would never do such a thing. But the old woman didn't believe him and started to scold him.
trans-d_mn_101: Orchim, I went to Huangshan for a trip, and I took a photo with the little monkey there.
trans-d_mn_317: I don't know what to do with the clothes and books I brought from abroad. Please help me.
trans-d_mn_150: I'm going to the hospital tomorrow, so I'll be late getting home today.
trans-d_mn_616: I don't like my job, I want to quit and start my own business. But I have a family to support, I can't do it now.
trans-d_mn_722: He is a very good person, he always helps others.
trans-d_mn_545: I'm going to the mall tomorrow, I'll buy you a gift, okay?
trans-d_mn_256: Do you want to go out for a walk with me?
trans-d_mn_633: The meeting is over, and I have to go to the company tomorrow, what should I do?
trans-d_mn_97: Do you want to go out for a walk with me?
trans-d_mn_143: Do you really think I'm joking? It's serious.
trans-d_mn_288: I will go to my company tomorrow, but I don't want to work overtime.
trans-d_mn_142: I'm busy now, shall we meet tomorrow?
trans-d_mn_516: Brother, do you know what time it is now?
trans-d_mn_223: It's okay, I can take care of it.
trans-d_mn_597: Come on, if you're feeling better, why don't you go to the hospital for a checkup? It's better to be safe than sorry!
trans-d_mn_366: The food is very delicious, I really like it.
trans-d_mn_488: The weather is so hot these days, I'm afraid it will rain.
trans-d_mn_310: Do you want to go out to play?
trans-d_mn_414: Come on, let's go for a walk, shall we?
trans-d_mn_497: Are you fine? I heard that Ulaanbaatar is very cold these days.
trans-d_mn_523: The old man is very sick, we should go and see him.
trans-d_mn_265: Did you finish your work and leave?
trans-d_mn_41: Why are you so anxious about your son's marriage? It's not a big deal.
trans-d_mn_430: You're so lucky! You can go out with your girlfriend whenever you want, aren't you happy?
trans-d_mn_394: 你这是要干什么？ 你这人怎么这样，你这是要干什么？
